slides.title: MCP から DeckSpec を経由して PPTX を作る

elements.altText: MCP, DeckSpec, lint, assets, diagram, and renderer architecture
elements.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 960 540" role="img"><title>pptcreater architecture</title><desc>A technical architecture diagram showing how AI agents call the MCP server, which creates DeckSpec, uses templates, assets, diagrams, lint, and renderer to produce PowerPoint files.</desc><rect width="960" height="540" fill="#ffffff" /><defs><marker id="arrow" markerWidth="12" markerHeight="12" refX="10" refY="6" orient="auto"><path d="M2,2 L10,6 L2,10 z" fill="#334155" /></marker></defs><rect x="484" y="50" width="192" height="376" rx="16" fill="#f8fafc" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-dasharray="6 4" /><text x="496" y="70" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="14" fill="#334155">pptcreater core</text><line x1="125" y1="245" x2="345" y2="245" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" /><text x="235" y="237" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#334155">tools</text><line x1="345" y1="245" x2="580" y2="115" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" /><text x="462.5" y="172" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#334155">create</text><line x1="580" y1="115" x2="580" y2="245" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" /><text x="580" y="172" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#334155">validate</text><line x1="580" y1="245" x2="580" y2="375" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" /><text x="580" y="302" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#334155">polish</text><line x1="580" y1="375" x2="815" y2="245" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" /><text x="697.5" y="302" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#334155">write</text><rect x="50" y="210" width="150" height="70" rx="14" fill="#dbeafe" stroke="#64748b" /><text x="125" y="250" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="700" fill="#0f172a">AI Agent</text><rect x="260" y="210" width="170" height="70" rx="14" fill="#e0f2fe" stroke="#64748b" /><text x="345" y="250" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="700" fill="#0f172a">MCP Server</text><rect x="500" y="80" width="160" height="70" rx="14" fill="#dcfce7" stroke="#64748b" /><text x="580" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="700" fill="#0f172a">DeckSpec</text><rect x="500" y="210" width="160" height="70" rx="14" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#64748b" /><text x="580" y="250" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="700" fill="#0f172a">Lint</text><rect x="500" y="340" width="160" height="70" rx="14" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#64748b" /><text x="580" y="380" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="700" fill="#0f172a">Renderer</text><rect x="740" y="210" width="150" height="70" rx="14" fill="#dcfce7" stroke="#64748b" /><text x="815" y="250" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="700" fill="#0f172a">PPTX</text></svg>
elements.summary: MCP, DeckSpec, lint, assets, diagram, and renderer architecture
elements.longDescription: A technical architecture diagram showing how AI agents call the MCP server, which creates DeckSpec, uses templates, assets, diagrams, lint, and renderer to produce PowerPoint files.

slides.title: 構造化された図解は generate_schematic に任せる

elements.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 960 540" role="img"><title>schema-first rendering</title><desc>vertical-flow schematic for a contextual pptcreater sample deck, generated from safe presets.</desc><rect width="960" height="540" fill="#0b1020" /><text x="48" y="58" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="24" font-weight="700" fill="#f8fafc">schema-first rendering</text><rect x="48" y="84" width="70" height="4" rx="2" fill="#2dd4bf" /><rect x="190" y="120" width="580" height="62" rx="16" fill="#151c2f" stroke="#2a3751" /><rect x="190" y="120" width="7" height="62" rx="3.5" fill="#2dd4bf" /><text x="222" y="146" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="700" fill="#f8fafc">Tool input</text><path d="M480 186v10m-7-7 7 7 7-7" fill="none" stroke="#2dd4bf" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" /><rect x="190" y="200" width="580" height="62" rx="16" fill="#151c2f" stroke="#2a3751" /><rect x="190" y="200" width="7" height="62" rx="3.5" fill="#2dd4bf" /><text x="222" y="226" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="700" fill="#f8fafc">DeckSpec schema</text><path d="M480 266v10m-7-7 7 7 7-7" fill="none" stroke="#2dd4bf" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" /><rect x="190" y="280" width="580" height="62" rx="16" fill="#151c2f" stroke="#2a3751" /><rect x="190" y="280" width="7" height="62" rx="3.5" fill="#2dd4bf" /><text x="222" y="306" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="700" fill="#f8fafc">Design lint</text><path d="M480 346v10m-7-7 7 7 7-7" fill="none" stroke="#2dd4bf" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" /><rect x="190" y="360" width="580" height="62" rx="16" fill="#151c2f" stroke="#2a3751" /><rect x="190" y="360" width="7" height="62" rx="3.5" fill="#2dd4bf" /><text x="222" y="386" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="700" fill="#f8fafc">Safe SVG</text><path d="M480 426v10m-7-7 7 7 7-7" fill="none" stroke="#2dd4bf" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" /><rect x="190" y="440" width="580" height="62" rx="16" fill="#151c2f" stroke="#2a3751" /><rect x="190" y="440" width="7" height="62" rx="3.5" fill="#2dd4bf" /><text x="222" y="466" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="700" fill="#f8fafc">PPTX renderer</text></svg>
elements.longDescription: vertical-flow schematic for a contextual pptcreater sample deck, generated from safe presets.

slides.title: 拡張点をツリーで整理する

elements.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 960 540" role="img"><title>拡張ポイント</title><desc>tree schematic for a contextual pptcreater sample deck, generated from safe y="154" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="700" fill="#f8fafc">pptcreater</text><path d="M480 192v70" stroke="#2a3751" stroke-width="2" /><path d="M480 262H140V315" fill="none" stroke="#2a3751" stroke-width="2" /><rect x="65" y="315" width="150" height="82" rx="18" fill="#151c2f" stroke="#2a3751" /><text x="140" y="349" text-anchor="middle" x="480" y="349" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#f8fafc">diagrams</text><path d="M480 262H650V315" fill="none" stroke="#2a3751" slides.title: 失敗しやすい自由SVGを安全な部品へ寄せる

elements.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 960 540" role="img"><title>安全側へ寄せる設計</title><desc>list schematic for a contextual pptcreater sample deck, generated from safe presets.</desc><rect width="960" height="540" fill="#0b1020" /><text x="48" y="58" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="24" font-weight="700" fill="#f8fafc">安全側へ寄せる設計</text><rect x="48" y="84" width="70" height="4" rx="2" fill="#2dd4bf" /><rect x="96" y="128" width="768" height="48" rx="14" fill="#151c2f" stroke="#2a3751" /><circle cx="124" cy="152" r="12" fill="#143a42" stroke="#2dd4bf" /><text x="124" y="157" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#2dd4bf">✓</text><text x="154" y="158" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="15" font-weight="600" fill="#f8fafc">native shapes for editable cards</text><rect x="96" y="190" width="768" height="48" rx="14" fill="#151c2f" stroke="#2a3751" /><circle cx="124" cy="214" r="12" fill="#143a42" stroke="#2dd4bf" /><text x="124" y="219" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#2dd4bf">✓</text><text x="154" y="220" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="15" font-weight="600" fill="#f8fafc">registered icons for reuse</text><rect x="96" y="252" width="768" height="48" rx="14" fill="#151c2f" stroke="#2a3751" /><circle cx="124" cy="276" r="12" fill="#143a42" stroke="#2dd4bf" /><text x="124" y="281" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#2dd4bf">✓</text><text x="154" y="282" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="15" font-weight="600" fill="#f8fafc">schematic presets for complex visuals</text><rect x="96" y="314" width="768" height="48" rx="14" fill="#151c2f" stroke="#2a3751" /><circle cx="124" cy="338" r="12" fill="#143a42" stroke="#2dd4bf" /><text x="124" y="343" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#2dd4bf">✓</text><text x="154" y="344" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="15" font-weight="600" fill="#f8fafc">lint before render</text><rect x="96" y="376" width="768" height="48" rx="14" fill="#151c2f" stroke="#2a3751" /><circle cx="124" cy="400" r="12" fill="#143a42" stroke="#2dd4bf" /><text x="124" y="405" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#2dd4bf">✓</text><text x="154" y="406" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="15" font-weight="600" fill="#f8fafc">relative output paths</text></svg>

sources.title: Slideland reference categories
sources.notes: Uses Slideland categories as inspiration only; visuals are generated by pptcreater presets.
